variants.title: Filtrec A110C10 Spin-On Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec A110C10. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the A110C10 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Length: 147.0 mm, Thread: 3/4" BSP, Δ Collapse Pressure: 12 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Collapse Pressure: 12 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Donaldson P565243 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Filtrec A1-10C10
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P565243 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Filtrec A1-10C10
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P565243 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On provides dependable protection for hydraulic systems by efficiently removing particulates and contaminants. It ensures clean hydraulic fluid, promoting smooth operation and extending the lifespan of critical system components. With its easy-to-install spin-on design, this filter minimizes downtime and maintenance costs. Its durable construction and advanced filtration media make it a trusted choice for industrial and mobile hydraulic applications requiring reliable performance.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Length: 147.0 mm, Thread: 3/4" BSP, Δ Collapse Pressure: 12 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Collapse Pressure: 12 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Mann Filter W 940/51 Hydraulics | Replaces the Filtrec A1-10C10
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter W 940/51 Hydraulics | Replaces the Filtrec A1-10C10
variants.description: MANN-FILTER spin-on hydraulic filters offer maximum filtration performance and thus ensure trouble-free operation of the hydraulic system. Thanks to the filter medium, which is specially adapted to the intended use, the finest impurities are separated from the hydraulic fluid.
specifications: Style: Hydraulics, Dimension A: 93.0 mm, Dimension B: 63.0 mm, Dimension C: 72.0 mm, Dimension G: G 3/4, Dimension H: 143.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 2.5 bar, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Length: 147.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Thread: 3/4" BSP, Collapse Pressure: 12 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.option1Value: Fleetguard HF6535 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Filtrec A1-10C10
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF6535 hydraulic spin-on filter with cellulose media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.

variants.title: Hydac 0080 MG 010 P Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A1-10C10
variants.option1Value: Hydac 0080 MG 010 P Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A1-10C10
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0080 MG 010 P Spin-On Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.
